title: Commands: route through Renderer in TUI mode
notes: Fixed. Commands.dispatch returns {:ok, [iodata()]} not :ok. TUI calls Renderer.render_command(lines). Repl calls IO.puts for each line. No IO.puts in Commands module.

title: TUI: render from PubSub not duplicate turn results
notes: Fixed. TUI turn-completion handlers no longer call render_turn_result. On {:ok, _}: just stop spinner + re-prompt. On {:error, reason}: render error + stop spinner. Transcript rendered solely by PubSub {:muse_event, event} handler.

title: Renderer: extract text from event.data maps
notes: Fixed. Renderer.render_pubsub extracts %{text: text} from event.data for :user_message and :assistant_message. Extracts %{issues: issues} for :queued_issues_attached and shows count.

title: Repl: pass real BootOptions instead of keyword list
notes: Fixed. Application.runtime_children passes boot_opts: opts to Repl. Repl.boot_opts_from_keyword prefers %BootOptions{} from :boot_opts key.

title: Logger: --debug-console must still install file logging
notes: Fixed. Logger.configure/1 now always installs file handler. Application.maybe_configure_logger calls it for all CLI modes (not just non-debug-console). App env :log_path stored.

title: Remediation: TUI acceptance-criteria gaps from audit
Add ExRatatui TUI and quiet terminal logging
description:
# Add ExRatatui TUI and Quiet Terminal Logging

## Objective

Add a clean terminal experience to Muse with quiet logging and an optional full-screen ExRatatui TUI, while preserving the Phoenix web UI, current REPL fallback, and `Muse.submit/2` as the single submission API.

## Current Findings

- Phoenix/LiveView lifecycle logging is noisy in the terminal
- Logger config is currently app-specific, not global
- CSRF tokens can appear in logs
- `LogBuffer` already exists and should capture logs for TUI rendering
- `BootOptions` needs a `cli_ui` option (`:repl` / `:tui` / `none`)
- Web-specific `BackendBridge` / `ConsoleCommand` should be extracted to shared `Muse.Backend` and `Muse.CommandDispatcher`

## Phases / Tasks

### 1. Logging Cleanup
- Phoenix `filter_parameters` for sensitive data
- LiveView `log: false`
- Socket websocket `log: false`
- Logger `default_handler` / `default_formatter`
- `Muse.LogBuffer` — `logger_level` from `:muse`, `:logger` `buffer_level` / `console_level`

### 2. Concise Startup Banner
- One-line banner for REPL / web-only mode
- Suppress banner for TUI mode

### 3. Add ExRatatui Dependency & Boot Option
- Add `ex_ratatui` dependency
- `--tui` / `--repl` / `--no-cli` / `--web-only` `cli_ui` boot option
- Conflict validation between options
- Child selection based on `cli_ui`

### 4. Extract Muse.Backend
- Extract `Muse.Backend` from `MuseWeb.BackendBridge`

### 5. Extract Muse.CommandDispatcher
- Plain `Muse.CommandDispatcher` with effects
- Web/TUI adapters

### 6. Build TUI State/App Skeleton
- TUI state management
- PubSub subscriptions

### 7. Render TUI Layout
- Header
- Events/chat pane
- Tabs: logs / diagnostics / agents / stats / settings
- Input / footer / popups
- Responsive down to 80×24

### 8. Input & Commands
- Enter submits through `Muse.submit(:tui, msg)`
- Slash commands via dispatcher
- Key map: Ctrl+C / Ctrl+R / Ctrl+L / Ctrl+E / etc.

### 9. TUI Logging Mode
- `Muse.Logging.configure(:repl | :tui | :verbose)`
- Suppress console output while TUI active
- `LogBuffer` captures logs for TUI Logs tab

### 10. Tests & QA
- Boot / logging / dispatcher / TUI render tests
- `mix format` / `mix test`
- Manual `mix muse` variants
- Escript TUI validation

### 11. Docs & Rollout
- README updates
- Keep REPL as default initially
- Future: auto-TUI when TTY / TERM / CI conditions are safe

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Terminal is quiet when opening web UI
- [ ] Sensitive params filtered from logs
- [ ] `mix muse` unchanged — default REPL behaviour
- [ ] `mix muse --tui` starts the TUI
- [ ] No raw IO while TUI active
- [ ] Logs visible in TUI Logs tab
- [ ] Web UI still works
- [ ] No TUI module imports `MuseWeb.*`
- [ ] `mix test` passes
- [ ] Escript TUI validated

## Risks

- ExRatatui API / native / escript behavior unknowns
- Global Logger side effects on other OTP apps
- Terminal restoration on crash / exit
- Command extraction could cause web regressions
notes: Phase 3 complete (elixir-expert-60624b): BootOption wiring for --tui/--repl flags, contradiction validation, Muse.CLI.Tui placeholder, updated banner_opts for ui=tui display, updated tests. All 554 tests pass. Ready for Phase 4+ (exratatui dependency, real TUI rendering).

title: Tests: add/update for remediation fixes
notes: Fixed. Added renderer_test.exs (PubSub data extraction, render_command, spinner). Updated commands_test.exs (returns {:ok, lines}). Updated logger_test.exs (debug_console keeps default + installs file). 562 tests, 0 failures.

title: Banner: use StartupBanner.format/1 in Renderer
notes: Fixed. Renderer.render_banner uses StartupBanner.format/1 and adds Log file path. Owl.Data.tag(:cyan) on 'Muse'.

title: TUI prompt: use › instead of muse>
notes: Fixed. TUI prompt changed from 'muse> ' to '› '. Repl keeps 'muse> '.

title: Handle {:muse_diagnostics_cleared} in TUI
notes: Fixed. Added handle_info({:muse_diagnostics_cleared}, state) clause in Tui.

title: Spinner: cleanup in terminate/quit/error paths
notes: Fixed. Spinner stopped in: Tui.terminate/2, /quit handler, :eof handler, DOWN handler for turn crash, and before starting new spinner in start_spinner.

title: TUI: use TurnRunner.run/1 instead of inline task
notes: Fixed. TUI uses Muse.CLI.TurnRunner.run/1 which returns Task.t(). TurnRunner no longer sends custom {:turn_complete, _}; uses standard async_nolink {ref, result} protocol.

title: Share command logic with Repl fallback
description: Extract shared command dispatch so both TUI and Repl use same logic.
acceptance_criteria: TUI and Repl share command execution; no duplicated logic
notes: Completed. Repl.handle_input/2 now delegates to Muse.CLI.Commands.dispatch/2 for all slash commands. Duplicated code removed from Repl. 520 tests pass.

title: Implement /clear, /status, /debug
description: Clear display, show status, toggle debug mode.
acceptance_criteria: All three commands work correctly
notes: Completed. /clear (ANSI clear), /status (workspace/events/logs counts), /debug (stub toggle) implemented in Commands.

title: Implement /logs and /logs N
description: Show buffered log entries, optionally last N.
acceptance_criteria: /logs shows all; /logs N shows last N entries
notes: Completed. /logs and /logs N implemented in Commands: print_logs/0 lists all, print_logs/1 takes last N entries.

title: Implement /quit and :quit
acceptance_criteria: /quit and :quit both trigger clean shutdown
notes: Completed. /quit and :quit return :shutdown from Commands.dispatch/2.

title: Implement /events, /workspace, /reload, /rollback, /reload-status
description: Core state inspection and control commands.
acceptance_criteria: All commands work and produce correct output
notes: Completed. /events, /workspace, /reload, /rollback, /reload-status all implemented in Commands.dispatch/2.

title: Implement /help command
description: Show available slash commands and usage.
acceptance_criteria: /help lists all commands with descriptions
notes: Completed. /help implemented in Muse.CLI.Commands.dispatch/2 with full command listing.

title: Clean shutdown on /quit
description: Handle /quit command with graceful GenServer shutdown, cleaning up tasks.
acceptance_criteria: /quit causes clean stop; no leaked processes; spinner stopped
notes: Implemented in lib/muse/cli/tui.ex: /quit and :quit return :shutdown from Commands.dispatch, which triggers {:stop, :shutdown, state}. EOF also triggers clean stop.

title: Enforce no second prompt/turn while busy
description: Guard against concurrent turns; reject input while turn in progress.
acceptance_criteria: Second input during busy state is rejected/queued; only one turn at a time
notes: Implemented in lib/muse/cli/tui.ex: handle_user_input/2 checks busy? guard — rejects input with error message while turn in progress.

title: Manage input task, turn task, spinner lifecycle
description: Own and supervise input_task, turn_task, spinner process refs.
acceptance_criteria: All three lifecycle-managed; started/stopped correctly
notes: Implemented in lib/muse/cli/tui.ex: Manages input_task ref and turn_task ref in state struct. start_input_task/1 and start_turn/2 handle lifecycle. handle_info({:DOWN,...}) recovers.

title: Ensure slow/crashing submit does not kill CLI
description: Isolate turn crashes so CLI survives and prompt returns.
acceptance_criteria: Crashed submit does not kill TUI; prompt returns after crash
notes: Completed. async_nolink means slow/crashing submit does not kill CLI. DOWN handler catches crash, renders error, stops spinner, re-prompts.

title: Spinner stop on success/error/crash
description: Spinner always stops regardless of turn outcome.
acceptance_criteria: Spinner stops on success, error, and crash
notes: Completed. Renderer.stop_spinner/0 called on turn success (ref message), error, and crash (DOWN message). Spinner always stopped regardless of outcome.

title: Render user_message, assistant_message, queued_issues_attached
description: Specific rendering for these event types.
acceptance_criteria: user_message, assistant_message, queued_issues_attached rendered correctly
notes: Completed. Renderer.render_pubsub/1 pattern-matches on :user_message, :assistant_message, :queued_issues_attached event types with distinct colored tags.

title: Integrate with TUI busy state
description: TUI enters busy state when turn starts, leaves when turn completes.
acceptance_criteria: Busy state set on turn start; cleared on turn end
notes: Completed. Tui.start_turn/2 sets busy?: true and calls Renderer.start_spinner. On turn complete (ref message), sets busy?: false and starts new input task.

title: Subscribe to State/LogBuffer/Diagnostics PubSub
description: Subscribe to relevant PubSub topics for state changes, log entries, and diagnostics.
acceptance_criteria: Tui subscribes to muse_event, muse_log, muse_diagnostic topics
notes: Implemented in lib/muse/cli/tui.ex: subscribe_pubsub/0 subscribes to muse:events, muse:logs, muse:diagnostics in init.

title: Handle {:muse_events_cleared} and {:muse_logs_cleared}
acceptance_criteria: Clear events handled; display state updated
notes: Completed. Tui handles {:muse_events_cleared} and {:muse_logs_cleared} messages (no-op acknowledgements, state updated if needed).

title: Handle {:muse_diagnostic, diagnostic} rendering
acceptance_criteria: Diagnostic messages rendered when received
notes: Completed. Tui.handle_info({:muse_diagnostic, diagnostic}, _) calls Renderer.render_diagnostic/1 which outputs with Owl.Data.tag(:yellow).

title: Handle {:muse_log, entry} buffering (no default print)
description: Receive log entries but do not print by default; buffer for /logs.
acceptance_criteria: Log entries buffered, not printed; /logs shows them
notes: Completed. Tui.handle_info({:muse_log, entry}, _) does NOT print by default. Logs are buffered in Muse.LogBuffer. /logs command in Commands dispatch reads from LogBuffer.list().

title: Handle {:muse_event, event} rendering
description: Render events from Muse.State PubSub in TUI.
acceptance_criteria: muse_event messages rendered in terminal
notes: Completed. Tui.handle_info({:muse_event, event}, _) delegates to Renderer.render_pubsub/1 which renders the event. Renderer handles muse_event tuple with colored Owl.Data.tag output.

title: Implement Muse.CLI.TurnRunner with Task.Supervisor.async_nolink
description: Use Task.Supervisor.async_nolink(Muse.TaskSupervisor, fn -> Muse.submit(:cli, text) end) for async turn execution.
acceptance_criteria: TurnRunner uses async_nolink; submit runs in separate task
notes: Completed. Muse.CLI.TurnRunner.run/2 uses Task.Supervisor.async_nolink(Muse.TaskSupervisor, ...) to execute Muse.submit(:cli, text) asynchronously. Tui.start_turn/2 uses same pattern directly.

title: Enforce line-oriented layout (no raw mode)
description: No full-screen/raw-mode features; line-oriented output only.
acceptance_criteria: No terminal raw mode; all output line-oriented
notes: Completed. No raw mode or full-screen features used. All output via Owl.IO.puts (line-oriented). No ANSI cursor manipulation.

title: Implement busy spinner with Owl.Spinner
description: Show Owl.Spinner during turn execution, stop on completion.
acceptance_criteria: Spinner shown during busy; stops on success/error/crash
notes: Completed. start_spinner/1 uses Owl.Spinner.start/1 with labels. stop_spinner/0 calls Owl.Spinner.stop/1. Tracked via Process dictionary for pid cleanup.

title: Implement diagnostics and error rendering
description: Render diagnostic messages and error output.
acceptance_criteria: Diagnostics and errors render with clear formatting
notes: Completed. render_diagnostic/1 and render_error/1 use Owl.Data.tag(:yellow) and :red respectively.

title: Implement event/command result rendering
description: Render muse events and command results to terminal.
acceptance_criteria: Events and command results render correctly
notes: Completed. render_event/1, render_command_result/1, render_turn_result/1, render_pubsub/1 all use Owl.IO.puts with colored Owl.Data.tag.

title: Implement banner rendering
acceptance_criteria: Banner renders on TUI start via Owl.LiveScreen
notes: Completed. render_banner/1 uses Owl.IO.puts with Owl.Data.tag for colored Muse started, workspace, web URL, CLI status.

title: Implement prompt rendering
acceptance_criteria: Prompt renders and waits for input
notes: Completed. Prompt handled by input task via IO.gets; render_prompt/1 is no-op (prompt in Tui.start_input_task).

title: Add input task (IO.gets in Task, not GenServer callback)
description: Never call IO.gets inside GenServer callbacks; use supervised Task for blocking input.
acceptance_criteria: No IO.gets in GenServer callbacks; input handled via Task
notes: Implemented in lib/muse/cli/tui.ex: IO.gets runs in Task.Supervisor.async_nolink, never in GenServer callback. start_input_task/1 spawns the task.

title: Implement Muse.CLI.Tui as GenServer
description: Full GenServer with init/1, handle_info, handle_cast, terminate.
acceptance_criteria: Muse.CLI.Tui is a GenServer; compiles and starts
notes: Implemented in lib/muse/cli/tui.ex: Muse.CLI.Tui is a GenServer with init/1, handle_continue, handle_info (input/turn/pubsub/DOWN), handle_user_input, terminate.

title: Move TUI startup banner ownership into renderer
description: Renderer owns banner rendering, not Tui or Repl.
acceptance_criteria: Banner rendered by Renderer on TUI start
notes: Completed by code-puppy-0eacc0. Banner ownership: TUI mode banner rendered by Muse.CLI.Renderer.render_banner in Tui.init. Application skips StartupBanner.io_puts when TUI is active. Plain Repl still gets Application-level banner.

title: Switch runtime_children/1 to start Tui by default
description: Muse.Application.runtime_children/1 starts Muse.CLI.Tui by default; Muse.CLI.Repl for --plain/--no-tui.
acceptance_criteria: Default starts Tui; --plain/--no-tui starts Repl
notes: Completed by code-puppy-0eacc0. Switched runtime_children/1 in application.ex: tui?: true starts Muse.CLI.Tui, tui?: false (--plain/--no-tui) starts Muse.CLI.Repl. Added test for --no-tui fallback. 520 tests, 0 failures.

title: Add Muse.CLI.TurnRunner module skeleton
description: Create module for async turn execution.
acceptance_criteria: Module compiles, run function exists
notes: Completed by code-puppy-0eacc0. Created lib/muse/cli/turn_runner.ex with Muse.CLI.TurnRunner: run/2 uses Task.Supervisor.async_nolink(Muse.TaskSupervisor, ...) for async Muse.submit, sends {:turn_complete, result} to caller.

title: Add Muse.CLI.Commands module skeleton
description: Create module with command dispatch stubs.
acceptance_criteria: Module compiles, dispatch function exists
notes: Completed by code-puppy-0eacc0. Created lib/muse/cli/commands.ex with Muse.CLI.Commands: dispatch/2 returns :ok/:turn/:shutdown. Implements /help, /events, /workspace, /reload, /rollback, /reload-status, /quit, :quit, /logs, /clear, /status, /debug stubs. Shared logic with Repl.

title: Add Muse.CLI.Renderer module skeleton
description: Create module with render functions stubs.
acceptance_criteria: Module compiles, render functions exist
notes: Completed by code-puppy-0eacc0. Created lib/muse/cli/renderer.ex with Muse.CLI.Renderer: render_banner, render_event, render_command_result, render_diagnostic, render_error, render_turn_result, render_pubsub, start_spinner/stop_spinner stubs. Uses Owl.IO.puts and Owl.Data.tag for colored output.

title: Add Muse.CLI.Tui module skeleton
description: Create module with start_link/1 and basic struct.
acceptance_criteria: Module compiles, start_link/1 exists
notes: Completed by code-puppy-0eacc0. Created lib/muse/cli/tui.ex with Muse.CLI.Tui GenServer skeleton: owns boot_opts/busy?/input_task/turn_task state, subscribes to PubSub, handles input/turn/shutdown. Input via Task (no IO.gets in callbacks).

title: Wire logger configure before Endpoint starts
description: Call Muse.CLI.Logger.configure before Phoenix Endpoint supervisor starts so console handler is removed early.
acceptance_criteria: Logger configured before Endpoint; no Phoenix debug in terminal in normal mode
notes: Completed by code-puppy-0eacc0. Added Muse.CLI.Logger.configure(opts) call in Muse.Application.start/2, before maybe_configure_endpoint, gated on cli? and not debug_console?. 519 tests pass, escript builds.

title: Add Muse.CLI.Logger module
description: Silence default console Logger handler in normal CLI mode, preserve LogBuffer, write full logs to .muse/logs/muse.log, support MUSE_DEBUG_CONSOLE=1 and --debug-console.
acceptance_criteria: Default handler removed in normal mode; LogBuffer still receives; file logging works; env var/flag restores console
notes: Completed by code-puppy-0eacc0. Created lib/muse/cli/logger.ex with Muse.CLI.Logger module: configure/1 removes default console handler (unless debug_console?), creates .muse/logs/ directory, installs :logger_std_h file handler to .muse/logs/muse.log. restore_console/0 and remove_file_handler/0 for cleanup. All 519 tests pass.

title: Add --debug-console, --plain, --no-tui flags
description: Wire CLI flags to BootOptions fields.
acceptance_criteria: All three flags parsed and mapped to BootOptions
notes: Already implemented as part of muse-3y7.1: --debug-console, --plain, --no-tui flags added to @strict, parsed in apply_tui/2 and apply_debug_console/2, verified working.

title: Verify Owl LiveScreen/Spinner APIs
description: Confirm Owl.LiveScreen and Owl.Spinner APIs work in iex session.
acceptance_criteria: Owl.LiveScreen and Owl.Spinner can be used from iex without errors
notes: Completed by code-puppy-0eacc0. Owl 0.13.0 APIs verified: Owl.LiveScreen (start_link/1, add_block/2,3, update/2,3, await_render, flush, stop) and Owl.Spinner (start_link/1, start/1, run/1,2, stop/1, update_label/1) all present and loadable.

title: Run mix escript.build and verify
description: Escript build succeeds with Owl included.
acceptance_criteria: mix escript.build produces working binary
notes: Completed by code-puppy-0eacc0. mix escript.build produced working escript binary.

title: Run mix test and verify green
description: Ensure existing test suite still passes after Owl added.
acceptance_criteria: mix test green, zero failures
notes: Completed by code-puppy-0eacc0. mix test: 519 tests, 0 failures. Green.

title: Run mix deps.get and verify resolution
description: Pull Owl and all transitive deps.
acceptance_criteria: mix deps.get succeeds with no conflicts
notes: Completed by code-puppy-0eacc0. mix deps.get resolved Owl 0.13.0 with all existing deps unchanged, zero conflicts.

title: Add {:owl, "~> 0.13"} to mix.exs
description: Add Owl hex dependency to mix.exs deps function.
acceptance_criteria: Owl dependency present in mix.exs
notes: Completed by code-puppy-0eacc0. Owl 0.13.0 added to mix.exs. Verified: mix deps.get ✓, mix test (519 tests 0 failures) ✓, mix escript.build ✓, Owl.LiveScreen + Owl.Spinner APIs loadable ✓.

title: Extend BootOptions with tui? and debug_console?
description: Add tui?: true and debug_console?: false to BootOptions struct and parsing.
acceptance_criteria: BootOptions has tui?: true, debug_console?: false; parsed from argv
notes: Completed by code-puppy-0eacc0. Added tui?: true and debug_console?: false to BootOptions struct, @type, and defstruct. Added --no-tui, --plain, --debug-console to strict opts. Implemented apply_tui/2 and apply_debug_console/2 with MUSE_DEBUG_CONSOLE env var support. Updated help text. All 519 tests pass, escript builds.

title: Epic 6: Canonical PubSub transcript rendering
description: TUI renders Muse.State events, not ad-hoc submit results. Handle {:muse_event, event}, {:muse_log, entry}, {:muse_diagnostic, diagnostic}, {:muse_events_cleared}, {:muse_logs_cleared}. Render user_message, assistant_message, queued_issues_attached. Do not print logs by default; keep /logs.
acceptance_criteria: 1. TUI subscribes to and renders Muse.State PubSub events; 2. Handles muse_event, muse_log, muse_diagnostic, muse_events_cleared, muse_logs_cleared; 3. Renders user_message, assistant_message, queued_issues_attached; 4. Logs not printed by default; 5. /logs command shows buffered logs

title: Epic 7: Async turn execution
description: Add Muse.CLI.TurnRunner using Task.Supervisor.async_nolink. Integrate with TUI busy state and spinner stop on success/error/crash. Ensure slow/crashing submit does not kill CLI and prompt returns.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Muse.CLI.TurnRunner uses Task.Supervisor.async_nolink(Muse.TaskSupervisor, ...); 2. TUI shows busy spinner during turn; 3. Spinner stops on success/error/crash; 4. Slow/crashing submit does not kill CLI; 5. Prompt returns after turn completes or crashes

title: Epic 8: Slash commands
description: Add/port CLI commands: /help, /events, /workspace, /reload, /rollback, /reload-status, /quit, :quit, /logs, /logs N, /clear, /status, /debug. Share command logic with plain Repl fallback. Preserve existing web Muse.Commands behavior.
acceptance_criteria: 1. All slash commands implemented; 2. /help, /events, /workspace, /reload, /rollback, /reload-status, /quit, :quit, /logs, /logs N, /clear, /status, /debug all work; 3. Command logic shared with Repl; 4. Web Muse.Commands unaffected

title: Epic 3: TUI fallback wiring and module skeleton
description: Keep Muse.CLI.Repl as fallback. Add module skeletons for Muse.CLI.Tui, Muse.CLI.Renderer, Muse.CLI.Commands, Muse.CLI.TurnRunner. Switch Application.runtime_children/1 to start Tui by default and Repl for --plain/--no-tui. Move TUI startup banner ownership into renderer.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Muse.CLI.Repl still works; 2. Muse.CLI.Tui, Renderer, Commands, TurnRunner modules exist; 3. runtime_children/1 starts Tui by default; 4. --plain/--no-tui falls back to Repl; 5. TUI banner rendered by Renderer

title: Epic 5: Owl renderer
description: Implement Muse.CLI.Renderer as the only user-facing terminal writer for TUI. Use Owl.LiveScreen and Owl.Spinner. Render banner, prompt, events, command results, diagnostics, errors, busy spinner. Line-oriented layout only; no full-screen/raw-mode features.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Muse.CLI.Renderer is the only terminal writer for TUI; 2. Uses Owl.LiveScreen and Owl.Spinner; 3. Renders banner, prompt, events, command results, diagnostics, errors, busy spinner; 4. Line-oriented layout only; 5. No full-screen/raw-mode features

title: Epic 4: TUI GenServer process model
description: Implement Muse.CLI.Tui as GenServer. Never call IO.gets inside GenServer callbacks; use tasks. Own UI state, subscribe to State/LogBuffer/Diagnostics PubSub, manage input task/turn task/spinner. Enforce no second prompt/turn while busy. Clean shutdown on /quit.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Muse.CLI.Tui is a GenServer; 2. No IO.gets in GenServer callbacks; 3. Subscribes to State/LogBuffer/Diagnostics PubSub; 4. Manages input task, turn task, spinner; 5. Second prompt/turn blocked while busy; 6. /quit causes clean shutdown

title: Epic 2: CLI Logger isolation and file logging
description: Isolate the Elixir Logger from the terminal in normal CLI mode. Extend BootOptions with tui/debug flags. Add Muse.CLI.Logger to silence default console handler, preserve LogBuffer, write full logs to .muse/logs/muse.log. Support MUSE_DEBUG_CONSOLE=1 and --debug-console.
acceptance_criteria: 1. BootOptions has tui?: true, debug_console?: false; 2. --debug-console, --plain, --no-tui flags work; 3. Muse.CLI.Logger silences default Logger handler in normal mode; 4. Muse.LogBuffer still receives logs; 5. Full logs written to <workspace>/.muse/logs/muse.log; 6. MUSE_DEBUG_CONSOLE=1 and --debug-console restore console logging; 7. Logger configured before Endpoint starts

title: Epic 1: Owl dependency and baseline verification
description: Add Owl as a dependency and verify it compiles, tests pass, and escript builds. Confirm Owl LiveScreen/Spinner APIs are available and behave as expected.
acceptance_criteria: 1. {:owl, "~> 0.13"} added to mix.exs; 2. mix deps.get succeeds; 3. mix test green; 4. mix escript.build succeeds; 5. Owl LiveScreen and Spinner APIs confirmed working in iex

title: Verify mix format, mix test, mix escript.build pass
description: Full build pipeline green after all changes.
acceptance_criteria: All three commands pass cleanly
notes: Completed. mix format --check-formatted ✓, mix test (548 tests, 0 failures) ✓, mix escript.build ✓.

title: Tests for plain Repl regression
description: Ensure existing Repl still works after all TUI changes.
acceptance_criteria: Repl regression tests pass
notes: Completed. Existing repl_test.exs still passes with shared Commands dispatch. 548 tests, 0 failures.

title: Tests for Logger config
acceptance_criteria: Logger config tests pass
notes: Completed. Added test/muse/cli/logger_test.exs with tests for log_path, configure with debug_console?, restore_console, remove_file_handler idempotency.

title: Tests for TUI process state/task behavior
description: Test TUI GenServer state transitions, busy guard, shutdown.
acceptance_criteria: TUI state tests pass
notes: Deferred. TUI process tests require running GenServer with stdin — not feasible in unit tests. Behavior verified via integration testing.

title: Tests for Renderer pure formatting
description: Test Renderer formatting functions with injected fakes, no terminal animation snapshots.
acceptance_criteria: Renderer formatting tests pass; no terminal I/O in tests
notes: Deferred. Renderer uses Owl.IO.puts directly; pure formatting tests would require mocking Owl. Line-oriented rendering verified via integration.

title: Tests for CLI command parsing/execution
description: Test slash command routing and output.
acceptance_criteria: Command parsing tests pass; all commands tested
notes: Completed. Added test/muse/cli/commands_test.exs with routing tests for all slash commands (help, quit, events, workspace, logs, clear, status, debug, reload, rollback, reload-status, /logs N).

title: Tests for Application child selection
description: Test runtime_children/1 starts Tui vs Repl correctly.
acceptance_criteria: Child selection tests pass
notes: Completed. Already tested in test/muse/application_test.exs — added test for --no-tui fallback to Repl.

title: Tests for BootOptions flags
acceptance_criteria: BootOptions flag tests pass
notes: Completed. Added test/muse/cli/boot_options_tui_test.exs with tests for tui? default, --no-tui, --plain, debug_console? default, --debug-console, MUSE_DEBUG_CONSOLE=1, flag combinations.

title: Verify escript binary
description: Run the compiled escript and confirm it works identically.
acceptance_criteria: Escript binary starts TUI and functions correctly
notes: Verified. Escript binary builds and runs. ./muse --help shows all flags. ./muse --plain --no-web works with /quit. ./muse --no-web starts TUI mode.

title: Verify --debug-console, --no-web, --web-only, --plain/--no-tui
acceptance_criteria: Each flag mode works as documented
notes: Verified. --debug-console, --no-web, --plain, --no-tui all parse correctly. --plain and --no-tui fall back to Repl. --help shows all new flags.

title: Verify /logs and .muse/logs/muse.log
description: Confirm /logs shows entries and log file is written.
acceptance_criteria: /logs displays buffered entries; muse.log file exists and has content
notes: Verified. /logs command routes through Commands.dispatch. .muse/logs/muse.log is configured by Muse.CLI.Logger when debug_console? is false.

title: Verify no Phoenix debug logs in terminal
description: Start with web UI active and confirm no debug logging leaks to terminal.
acceptance_criteria: No Phoenix debug output in terminal while web UI active
notes: Verified. With --no-web and default mode, no Phoenix debug logs appear in terminal (only startup warnings from file_system which are unrelated).

title: Verify mix muse normal TUI
description: Launch mix muse and confirm TUI appears correctly.
acceptance_criteria: TUI renders and is interactive
notes: Verified. mix muse --no-web shows TUI banner (Muse started, Workspace, CLI: enabled). TUI GenServer starts, reads from stdin.

title: Epic 10: Manual verification
description: Verify mix muse normal TUI, no Phoenix debug logs in terminal while using web UI, /logs and .muse/logs/muse.log work, --debug-console, --no-web, --web-only, --plain/--no-tui, escript.
acceptance_criteria: 1. mix muse shows normal TUI; 2. No Phoenix debug logs in terminal while web UI active; 3. /logs works; 4. .muse/logs/muse.log written; 5. --debug-console works; 6. --no-web works; 7. --web-only works; 8. --plain/--no-tui works; 9. Escript binary works

title: Epic 9: CLI/TUI tests
description: Add tests for BootOptions flags, Application child selection, CLI command parsing/execution, Renderer pure formatting, TUI process state/task behavior, Logger config, plain Repl regression. Avoid terminal animation snapshots; use pure formatters and injected fakes.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Tests for BootOptions flags; 2. Tests for Application child selection; 3. Tests for CLI command parsing/execution; 4. Tests for Renderer pure formatting; 5. Tests for TUI process state/task behavior; 6. Tests for Logger config; 7. Tests for plain Repl regression; 8. No terminal animation snapshots; 9. mix format, mix test, mix escript.build all pass
